fix: Use absolute imports: from modules.backend.xxx import ...

description: No direct import logging in modules/
API layer must not import repositories directly
fix: API endpoints must use services, never repositories. Import from modules.backend.services instead.

description: Telegram handlers must not import models or repositories
fix: Telegram handlers must use services or API client, never access data layer directly.

description: __init__.py files must be minimal (imports and __all__ only)
fix: Move logic to dedicated modules, keep __init__.py to re-exports only
Move orchestration logic to a service method

description: Repositories must not import from services
fix: Repositories are below services in the layer hierarchy. Remove the upward dependency.

description: Models must not import from services or repositories
fix: Models are the bottom layer. They must not depend on services or repositories.
